en.text: to determine the winner first.

verified_text: 非常刺激

en.text: But it was regrettable crossing the finish line.

zh.text: 收穫策騎生涯最大勝利嘅

verified_text: 人生高光時刻

verified_text: 瞬間變成翻車現場

zh.text: 瞬間變成翻車現場

verified_text: 其實大家都好戥佢開心

zh.text: 其實大家都好為佢開心

verified_text: 史騰雷
